cli.usage:
Usage: node src/audit.mjs [options]

Options:
  --target <path>       Target directory (default: ~/.claude/)
  --workspace <path>    Workspace dir for plans/checklist/rules (default: .)
  --format <fmt>        Output format: json|markdown (default: markdown)
  --category <name>     Specific category only: claude-md|settings|hooks|skills|memory|mcp|workflow
  --severity <level>    Minimum severity: critical|major|minor (default: minor)
  --top <n>             Top N quick wins (default: 5)
  --fix-mode <mode>     Fix proposal mode: off|propose (default: off)
  --skip-external       Exclude external skills (source: community etc.) from indicator counts
  --lang <lang>         Output language: ja|en (default: ja)
  --quiet               Show violations only
  --help                This help message

Inline exclusion (v0.2.0+):
  Add a `hd-ignore: IND-NN` comment line to a file to skip that indicator for it.
  Example: // hd-ignore: IND-11 — intentional state persistence

Environment:
  NEKO_HARNESS_WORKSPACE  Fallback for --workspace

Exit codes:
  0 - Diagnosis complete
  1 - Target not found
  2 - Internal error

grade.title: neko-harness-doctor diagnosis result
grade.demoted: Base {base} demoted by {demotion} level(s) due to {criticals} critical violation(s)

violations.title: Detected Issues
violations.none: **No violations**. All indicators pass, no improvements needed.
